{{Navbox | name = Tokugawa chronology | title = [[File:Tokugawa family crest.svg|15px|Tokugawa family crest]] Timeline and paternities of the [[Tokugawa shogunate|Tokugawa Shogunate]] | state = {{{state|{{{1|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}}}}} | basestyle = background:white; | liststyle = border-top:#aaa 1px solid;font-size:105%; | imagestyle = border-top:#aaa 1px solid; vertical-align:top; text-align:left; padding-top:1em; | imageclass = nowrap | image = {{legend|#ffcccc|Lifespan}}{{legend|#ff0000|Reign}} | list1 = {{#tag:timeline| DateFormat = x.y
Period = from:1535 till:1915 Define $skip = at:end # Force a blank line ImageSize= width:900 height:680 TimeAxis = orientation:horizontal PlotArea = right:1 left:1 bottom:20 top:1
Colors = id:bg value:rgb(0.96,1,1) id:lightline value:rgb(0.9,0.9,0.9) id:lighttext value:rgb(0.5,0.5,0.5) id:alive value:rgb(1,0.8,0.8) id:shogun value:rgb(1,0,0) id:gridlines value:rgb(0.4,0.9,0.9)
BackgroundColors = canvas:bg ScaleMajor = gridcolor:gridlines unit:year increment:20 start:1540
BarData = barset:ieyasu barset:hidetada barset:iemitsu barset:ietsuna barset:tsunayoshi barset:ienobu barset:ietsugu barset:yoshimune barset:ieshige barset:ieharu barset:ienari barset:ieyoshi barset:iesada barset:iemochi barset:yoshinobu
PlotData= width:40 textcolor:black shift:(5,0) anchor:from fontsize:m
barset:ieyasu color:alive from:1543 till:1603 barset:break color:shogun from:1603 till:1605 barset:break color:alive from:1605 till:1616 barset:break color:bg from:1626 till:1626 text:[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]]~(1543–1616) barset:break color:bg from:1686 till:1686 text:1st ''shōgun'' (1603–1605); son of~[[Matsudaira Hirotada]]
barset:hidetada color:alive from:1579 till:1632 barset:break color:shogun from:1605 till:1623 barset:break color:alive from:1623 till:1632 barset:break color:bg from:1642 till:1642 text:[[Tokugawa Hidetada]]~(1579–1632) barset:break color:bg from:1702 till:1702 text:2nd ''shōgun'' (1605–1623)~son of Ieyasu
barset:iemitsu color:alive from:1604 till:1623 barset:break color:shogun from:1623 till:1651 barset:break color:bg from:1661 till:1661 text:[[Tokugawa Iemitsu]]~(1604–1651) barset:break color:bg from:1721 till:1721 text:3rd ''shōgun'' (1623–1651)~son of Hidetada
barset:ietsuna color:alive from:1641 till:1651 barset:break color:shogun from:1651 till:1680 barset:break color:bg from:1690 till:1690 text:[[Tokugawa Ietsuna]]~(1641–1680) barset:break color:bg from:1750 till:1750 text:4th ''shōgun'' (1641–1680)~son of Iemitsu
barset:tsunayoshi color:alive from:1646 till:1680 barset:break color:shogun from:1680 till:1709 barset:break color:bg from:1719 till:1719 text:[[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]]~(1646–1709) barset:break color:bg from:1779 till:1779 text:5th ''shōgun'' (1680–1709)~son of Iemitsu, brother of Ietsuna
barset:ienobu color:alive from:1662 till:1709 barset:break color:shogun from:1709 till:1712 barset:break color:bg from:1722 till:1722 text:[[Tokugawa Ienobu]]~(1662–1712) barset:break color:bg from:1782 till:1782 text:6th ''shōgun'' (1709–1712)~son of Tokugawa Tsunashige
barset:ietsugu color:alive from:1709 till:1713 barset:break color:shogun from:1713 till:1716 barset:break color:bg from:1726 till:1726 text:[[Tokugawa Ietsugu]]~(1709–1716) barset:break color:bg from:1786 till:1786 text:7th ''shōgun'' (1713–1716)~son of Ienobu
barset:yoshimune color:bg from:1624 till:1624 text:[[Tokugawa Yoshimune]]~(1684–1751) barset:break color:alive from:1684 till:1716 barset:break color:shogun from:1716 till:1745 barset:break color:alive from:1745 till:1751 barset:break color:bg from:1761 till:1761 text:8th ''shōgun'' (1716–1745); son of~[[Tokugawa Mitsusada]]
barset:ieshige color:bg from:1651 till:1651 text:[[Tokugawa Ieshige]]~(1711–1761) barset:break color:alive from:1711 till:1745 barset:break color:shogun from:1745 till:1760 barset:break color:alive from:1760 till:1761 barset:break color:bg from:1771 till:1771 text:9th ''shōgun'' (1745–1760)~son of Yoshimune
barset:ieharu color:bg from:1667 till:1667 text:[[Tokugawa Ieharu]]~(1737–1786) barset:break color:alive from:1737 till:1760 barset:break color:shogun from:1760 till:1786 barset:break color:bg from:1796 till:1796 text:10th ''shōgun'' (1760–1786)~son of Ieshige
barset:ienari color:bg from:1653 till:1653 text:[[Tokugawa Ienari]]~(1773–1841) barset:break color:bg from:1703 till:1703 text:11th ''shōgun'' (1787–1837)~adopted son of Ieharu barset:break color:alive from:1773 till:1787 barset:break color:shogun from:1787 till:1837 barset:break color:alive from:1837 till:1841
barset:ieyoshi color:bg from:1673 till:1673 text:[[Tokugawa Ieyoshi]]~(1793–1853) barset:break color:alive from:1723 till:1723 text:12th ''shōgun'' (1837–1853)~son of Ienari barset:break color:alive from:1793 till:1837 barset:break color:shogun from:1837 till:1853
barset:iesada color:bg from:1704 till:1704 text:[[Tokugawa Iesada]]~(1824–1858) barset:break color:bg from:1754 till:1754 text:13th ''shōgun'' (1853–1858)~son of Ieyoshi barset:break color:alive from:1824 till:1853 barset:break color:shogun from:1853 till:1858
barset:iemochi color:bg from:1706 till:1706 text:[[Tokugawa Iemochi]]~(1846–1866) barset:break color:bg from:1756 till:1756 text:14th ''shōgun'' (1858–1866); son of~[[Tokugawa Nariyuki]] barset:break color:alive from:1846 till:1858 barset:break color:shogun from:1858 till:1866
barset:yoshinobu color:bg from:1697 till:1697 text:[[Tokugawa Yoshinobu]]~(1837–1913) barset:break color:bg from:1757 till:1757 text:15th (last) ''shōgun'' (1867–1868)~son of Tokugawa Nariaki barset:break color:alive from:1837 till:1867 barset:break color:shogun from:1867 till:1868 barset:break color:alive from:1868 till:1913 }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}} }}

Period = from:1535 till:1915 Define $skip = at:end # Force a blank line ImageSize= width:900 height:680 TimeAxis = orientation:horizontal PlotArea = right:1 left:1 bottom:20 top:1

BackgroundColors = canvas:bg ScaleMajor = gridcolor:gridlines unit:year increment:20 start:1540
BarData = barset:ieyasu barset:hidetada barset:iemitsu barset:ietsuna barset:tsunayoshi barset:ienobu barset:ietsugu barset:yoshimune barset:ieshige barset:ieharu barset:ienari barset:ieyoshi barset:iesada barset:iemochi barset:yoshinobu
PlotData= width:40 textcolor:black shift:(5,0) anchor:from fontsize:m
barset:ieyasu color:alive from:1543 till:1603 barset:break color:shogun from:1603 till:1605 barset:break color:alive from:1605 till:1616 barset:break color:bg from:1626 till:1626 text:[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]]~(1543–1616) barset:break color:bg from:1686 till:1686 text:1st ''shōgun'' (1603–1605); son of~[[:en:Matsudaira Hirotada|Matsudaira Hirotada]]
barset:hidetada color:alive from:1579 till:1632 barset:break color:shogun from:1605 till:1623 barset:break color:alive from:1623 till:1632 barset:break color:bg from:1642 till:1642 text:[[:en:Tokugawa Hidetada|Tokugawa Hidetada]]~(1579–1632) barset:break color:bg from:1702 till:1702 text:2nd ''shōgun'' (1605–1623)~son of Ieyasu
barset:iemitsu color:alive from:1604 till:1623 barset:break color:shogun from:1623 till:1651 barset:break color:bg from:1661 till:1661 text:[[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]]~(1604–1651) barset:break color:bg from:1721 till:1721 text:3rd ''shōgun'' (1623–1651)~son of Hidetada
barset:ietsuna color:alive from:1641 till:1651 barset:break color:shogun from:1651 till:1680 barset:break color:bg from:1690 till:1690 text:[[Tokugawa Ietsuna]]~(1641–1680) barset:break color:bg from:1750 till:1750 text:4th ''shōgun'' (1641–1680)~son of Iemitsu
barset:tsunayoshi color:alive from:1646 till:1680 barset:break color:shogun from:1680 till:1709 barset:break color:bg from:1719 till:1719 text:[[Tokugawa Tsunayoshi]]~(1646–1709) barset:break color:bg from:1779 till:1779 text:5th ''shōgun'' (1680–1709)~son of Iemitsu, brother of Ietsuna
barset:ienobu color:alive from:1662 till:1709 barset:break color:shogun from:1709 till:1712 barset:break color:bg from:1722 till:1722 text:[[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]]~(1662–1712) barset:break color:bg from:1782 till:1782 text:6th ''shōgun'' (1709–1712)~son of Tokugawa Tsunashige
barset:ietsugu color:alive from:1709 till:1713 barset:break color:shogun from:1713 till:1716 barset:break color:bg from:1726 till:1726 text:[[Tokugawa Ietsugu]]~(1709–1716) barset:break color:bg from:1786 till:1786 text:7th ''shōgun'' (1713–1716)~son of Ienobu
barset:yoshimune color:bg from:1624 till:1624 text:[[Tokugawa Yoshimune]]~(1684–1751) barset:break color:alive from:1684 till:1716 barset:break color:shogun from:1716 till:1745 barset:break color:alive from:1745 till:1751 barset:break color:bg from:1761 till:1761 text:8th ''shōgun'' (1716–1745); son of~[[Tokugawa Mitsusada]]
barset:ieshige color:bg from:1651 till:1651 text:[[Tokugawa Ieshige]]~(1711–1761) barset:break color:alive from:1711 till:1745 barset:break color:shogun from:1745 till:1760 barset:break color:alive from:1760 till:1761 barset:break color:bg from:1771 till:1771 text:9th ''shōgun'' (1745–1760)~son of Yoshimune
barset:ieharu color:bg from:1667 till:1667 text:[[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]]~(1737–1786) barset:break color:alive from:1737 till:1760 barset:break color:shogun from:1760 till:1786 barset:break color:bg from:1796 till:1796 text:10th ''shōgun'' (1760–1786)~son of Ieshige
barset:ienari color:bg from:1653 till:1653 text:[[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]]~(1773–1841) barset:break color:bg from:1703 till:1703 text:11th ''shōgun'' (1787–1837)~adopted son of Ieharu barset:break color:alive from:1773 till:1787 barset:break color:shogun from:1787 till:1837 barset:break color:alive from:1837 till:1841
barset:ieyoshi color:bg from:1673 till:1673 text:[[Tokugawa Ieyoshi]]~(1793–1853) barset:break color:alive from:1723 till:1723 text:12th ''shōgun'' (1837–1853)~son of Ienari barset:break color:alive from:1793 till:1837 barset:break color:shogun from:1837 till:1853
barset:iesada color:bg from:1704 till:1704 text:[[Tokugawa Iesada]]~(1824–1858) barset:break color:bg from:1754 till:1754 text:13th ''shōgun'' (1853–1858)~son of Ieyoshi barset:break color:alive from:1824 till:1853 barset:break color:shogun from:1853 till:1858
barset:iemochi color:bg from:1706 till:1706 text:[[Tokugawa Iemochi]]~(1846–1866) barset:break color:bg from:1756 till:1756 text:14th ''shōgun'' (1858–1866); son of~[[Tokugawa Nariyuki]] barset:break color:alive from:1846 till:1858 barset:break color:shogun from:1858 till:1866
barset:yoshinobu color:bg from:1697 till:1697 text:[[Tokugawa Yoshinobu]]~(1837–1913) barset:break color:bg from:1757 till:1757 text:15th (last) ''shōgun'' (1867–1868)~son of Tokugawa Nariaki barset:break color:alive from:1837 till:1867 barset:break color:shogun from:1867 till:1868 barset:break color:alive from:1868 till:1913 }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation | content = {{Collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}} }}
